headline: ComEd Continues Power Restoration Following Two Powerful Storms
summary: CHICAGO, June 13, 2026--ComEd crews continue restoring power to customers impacted by multiple rounds of severe storms that moved through northern Illinois beginning Wednesday afternoon. With the most volatile weather now past the region, crews are focused on completing repairs and restoring service to remaining pockets of customers affected by storm damage.
